creator: obrien@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

I commited the mastersite change.  However this PR's diffs contained so 
many grauitious white space chagnes, I couldn't find the content for the 
CC/CFLAGS/PREFIX/LOCALBASE/X11BASE changes.  If a proper [minimal] diff 
based on existing files is submitted, I'll commit it.
